title: Property Consultant - Atul Projects - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Atul Projects - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Atul Projects has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Atul Projects:
Atul Projects is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atul Projects!
